# WeShare EduTech

> A community learning publication where participants publish structured lessons that everyone can read freely. Sign in to publish, comment, clap, and bookmark.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse the latest published lessons.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in to your account.
- [Get started](/signup): Create a free account to publish and engage.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/reset-password): Recover access to your account.
